mode.description: One of: direct (perform the next_action yourself), parallel (decompose into child agents), done (goal achieved with evidence).

because.description: Concise reasoning for the chosen mode and next_action.

next_action.description: Concrete instruction for the actor when mode=direct. Empty string for parallel or done.

expect.description: What observable result is expected from this step.

decompose.description: When mode=parallel, up to 5 self-contained sub-goals for child agents. Empty otherwise.

sub_goal.description: Self-contained sub-goal for a child agent.

agent_id.description: Short unique identifier for the child.
